# PR Review Template

Use this to review an agent-produced change.

## Review scope

- Task brief: `[path]`
- Execution plan: `[path or n/a]`
- Branch or PR: `[identifier]`

## Findings

List findings in severity order.
Prioritize correctness, regressions, architecture boundary violations, missing
tests, token/secret handling, and public-channel behavior changes.

### `[severity]` `[short title]`

- File or area: `[path]`
- Concern: `[bug, risk, regression, or missing test]`
- Why it matters: `[explanation]`
- Requested action: `[specific fix or proof needed]`

Repeat as needed.

## Open questions

- `[question]`

## Decision

- Approved
- Approved with follow-up
- Changes requested
- Blocked pending decision

## Checks reviewed

- `[command and result]`
- `[command and result]`
